programme.title: Our Hillside Moments - EP 7
programme.desc: The cast once again take on the OHM card game, with soul-searching questions that cut deep—some break into tears, others embrace, baring their true feelings. Their final night unfolds at a scenic campsite: a fierce water fight fuels their competitive streak, while dazzling fireworks under the night sky reveal tender hearts—ending Our Hillside Moments on its most unforgettable night.

programme.title: Unforgivable - EP 17
programme.desc: Two little girls go missing at around the same time. SOD and Detective Wang's team must collaborate to solve the case. Time is of the essence as they fear for the girls' safety. Weiliang's wife and family begin to suspect him. The parents of one of the missing girls are famous influencers, they publicly criticize the police, resulting in SOD being removed from the investigation.

programme.title: Unforgivable - EP 18
programme.desc: The members of SOD decide to defy orders and conduct their own private investigation. They discover that the series of cases are all connected to Weiliang. Meanwhile, Weiliang's wife can no longer conceal her suspicions and confronts him directly. Weiliang realizes that the police are onto him and goes on the run. The police launch a massive pursuit.

programme.title: Proud Of You (Ep351-450) - EP 380
programme.desc: Wenxue arrives and overhears Jiansi and Shujun arguing about the bid. Once they leave, she secretly checks Jiansil’s tender documents.

programme.title: Proud Of You (Ep351-450) - EP 381

programme.title: Frontline - EP 1
programme.desc: The war in the Middle East has wreaked massive havoc in travellers’ plans. Frontline speaks to one returning Singaporean who was supposed to work in Dubai but has now decided to embark on a new journey in Singapore. How have Singaporeans’ travel plans changed? Some tourists flew across the world just to see the Merlion—only to find it wrapped in scaffolding. Why? Watch to find out how Singapore keeps its iconic statue spotless.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 7
programme.desc: Guo Ying finds Li Na on the yacht and asks her where Wen Guang is. Li Na says she does not know and lies about how Wen Guang had killed someone for her. Guo Ying's guard is let down, and Li Na takes the opportunity to poison her and escape. As the poison starts to take effect, Zhi Ming does his best to escort Guo Ying back on land for treatment despite being poisoned himself.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 8
programme.desc: Guo Ying receives tip off about important evidence for an arms smuggling case. Finding it suspicious, she reports to Wu Sir, who deploys Ying Jie and a few other CID personnel to investigate. In the house, Ying Jie finds a microchip and hides it. As Ying Jie was going to check the microchip data, Guo Ying appears. She realises her father, Yao Kang, is the mole in the police force.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 13
programme.desc: A foreign worker who once helped Wei Ren fix his computer is moving house. Wei Ren and Ting Xuan offer to help him. While helping him, they start to develop some feelings for each other. As they come into physical contact, their hearts start beating quickly, and they suspect they have fallen for each other. Upon reaching home, they are unable to sleep well as the memories of them spending time with each other replay in their minds.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 14
programme.desc: Yan Xun gifts a new bracelet to Xi Yue, but Xi Yue is not elated upon receiving it. She feels that the old bracelet has too much meaning to her, and that its importance cannot be replaced by the new bracelet. Yan Xun does not understand why Xi Yue is so stubborn, and the two of them argue. In a fit of anger, Xi Yue runs downstairs and flings the bracelet away. After the incident, she regrets doing so and wants to find the bracelet back, but her search for it is in vain.

programme.title: My Fair Lady - EP 1
programme.desc: According to the legend, during the Period of the Warring States, there was a woman gifted with immense abilities. Her name is Zhong Wu Yan. Among the many talented individuals of that era, she stands out from the crowd, due in no small part to her knowledge of warfare, weapons and magic. Her gifts bring her to the attention of Emperor Qi, who takes her as his bride in order to help him manage the kingdom.

programme.title: The Disappearing Borders - EP 6
programme.desc: The news team travels to different continents, interviewing hundreds of countries and cities, providing viewers with materials to understand the world and different perspectives.

programme.title: Fixer S4 - EP 3
programme.desc: Amritsar, a city in Punjab and near Pakistan border, is the holy city of Sikhism and also a notorious drug den. Smugglers use migrant workers and poor farmers to smuggle drugs to various cities for the local drug dealers to distribute and get the local men and women to be heavily addicted to drugs.

programme.title: The Second Husband - EP 81
programme.desc: Feng Shanhua overcomes various hardships even after being wrongly accused. This is a story of fate, love, secrets and forgiveness that stem from her relationship with her two families, one of her birth mother and the other of the mother who raised her.

programme.title: Past Life, Present Love - EP 7
programme.desc: "Yu Da" decides on a New York retro themed wedding and Ming Xi is unsettled, as this was something only Yun Feng knows. Ming Xi tells Wei Lun that Pu Da Ren is planning a secret meeting with a supplier on the day of the wedding.

programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 61
programme.desc: While enjoying a romantic date with Youming, Dongxu is caught off guard when he unexpectedly runs into Xiuqian's biological mother, Song Xiaosong, leaving him completely stunned.

programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 62
programme.desc: Shizhen confronts A-Feng, revealing that she is Zhang Hao's daughter and urging her to give up any thoughts of being with him. Devastated by the truth, A-Feng resolves to drop out of school and cut off all contact with Zhang Hao.

programme.title: Let's Go Home S3 - EP 2
programme.desc: Let’s Go Home 3 makes a return, bringing a cross-border journey filled with new emotions and surprises! Led by host Bowie Tsang, the show brings together a lineup of cross-industry celebrity guests — including Hsieh Ying-Hsuan, Annie Chen, Ethan Ruan, Tanya Chua and more — as they embark on a heartfelt journey home, rediscovering their most genuine connections with their hometowns, families, and themselves.

programme.title: Hotel Del Luna - EP 4
programme.desc: Canxing having overcome his fear of the eyeless woman, brings her to the hotel and shows her that she doesn't need to be blind any more.

programme.title: News Tonight
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Let's Go Home S3 - EP 2
programme.desc: Let’s Go Home 3 makes a return, bringing a cross-border journey filled with new emotions and surprises! Led by host Bowie Tsang, the show brings together a lineup of cross-industry celebrity guests — including Hsieh Ying-Hsuan, Annie Chen, Ethan Ruan, Tanya Chua and more — as they embark on a heartfelt journey home, rediscovering their most genuine connections with their hometowns, families, and themselves.

programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 61
programme.desc: While enjoying a romantic date with Youming, Dongxu is caught off guard when he unexpectedly runs into Xiuqian's biological mother, Song Xiaosong, leaving him completely stunned.

programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 62
programme.desc: Shizhen confronts A-Feng, revealing that she is Zhang Hao's daughter and urging her to give up any thoughts of being with him. Devastated by the truth, A-Feng resolves to drop out of school and cut off all contact with Zhang Hao.

programme.title: Pure White
programme.desc: Vural, a husband and a father who was raised in faith, leads a seemingly pious and conformist life. Yet, everything takes a sudden dark turn when he learns a truth that will force him to confront his views on religion and morality.

programme.title: A Murder Of Crows A Vigilante Justice
programme.desc: When a ransom demand suddenly appears, the disappearance of 19-year-old Tim Jatzkowski is now a cause of concern. While the boy’s father wants the police to rescue him, inspector Martin Brühl tries to convince his family to pay the ransom.

programme.title: Three Quarter Moon
programme.desc: Hartmut, a taxi-driver, is left in a bitter slump when his wife leaves him. That is, until he gets six-year-old Hayat and her mother in his taxi. In a serendipitous turn of events, Hayat is left under his care and she helps him learn to enjoy life again.

programme.title: Confetti
programme.desc: Due to her dyslexia, Meimei is ostracized by her school and community. Encouraged by Meimei's teacher from school, Lan leaves everything behind in China for New York City in hopes of finding an education program for her daughter.

programme.title: Man And A Baby
programme.desc: Dad (Antti) is left alone with a newborn after the mom (Pia) decides motherhood is not her thing. Single dad tries to survive alone in "women's world" and keep the baby and himself alive.

programme.title: A Far Shore
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Aoi is an underage mother struggling to make ends meet and dealing with her husband’s violent temper. After her husband loses his job, their continuous fights lead them to a social downfall.

programme.title: A Murder Of Crows Jealousy
programme.desc: Inspector Bruhl is investigating the abduction of a young boy from a playground, until evidence suggests that the boy doesn’t exist at all. Is he a figment of the alleged mother’s fractured reality, or are answers buried in her traumatic past?

programme.title: Almost Entirely A Slight Disaster
programme.desc: In contemporary Istanbul, four youths in their twenties find themselves brought together by chance. Restless, disillusioned, and searching for direction, the four characters go face to face with the anxieties of their generation.

programme.title: Run Up!
programme.desc: After a life-altering accident shatters her dreams, Elodie, a young hiker turned paraplegic, discovers the power of wheelchair sports. With the help of her trainer Isabelle, she is able to awaken from her lethargy and recognize true victories in life.

programme.title: Free Money
programme.desc: Based on true stories of the crypto and investment craze of the early 2020-ies. Crypto's allure, wealth's pursuit, and the lessons of a changing financial world collide in an intense journey of three interconnected lives - an unwitting Bitcoin holder, a crypto entrepreneur and a conservative banker.

programme.title: Open Door
programme.desc: Rudina embarks on a road trip with her pregnant sister Elma back to their Albanian hometown. However, Elma is unmarried, and they need to find someone to play the part of her husband in order not to anger their traditional father.

programme.title: Nick-Off Duty
programme.desc: When Lenny sets off on a mission to avenge her mother’s murder, she finds herself in trouble with the Russian mob and an underground organ harvesting ring. Her father, Hamburg cop Nick and his partner must race against the clock to rescue her.

programme.title: Cash On Delivery
programme.desc: This tale depicts the pain, prejudice, and guilt of a young man who is filled with fear and doubt about apples and the apple bearers because of a past incident in which he brutalizes his partner due to an apple-related event.

programme.title: To Kill A Mongolian Horse
programme.desc: Saina, a herdsman by day and horseback performer by night, clings to his heritage on the wintry steppes of Inner Mongolia, as he’s forced to confront the crumbling of the world he once knew.

programme.title: The Little Comrade
programme.desc: During Stalinist tyranny, 6-year-old Leelo’s mother is sent to a prison camp. Haunted by her mother’s last words telling her to be a good kid, Leelo vows to be on her best behaviour in the hope that it will bring her mother back.

programme.title: Man And A Baby
programme.desc: Dad (Antti) is left alone with a newborn after the mom (Pia) decides motherhood is not her thing. Single dad tries to survive alone in "women's world" and keep the baby and himself alive.

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 7
programme.desc: Nadia introduces her bridesmaids to Ashraf and in come Jen, Nadia's cousin. The one who Ashraf ghosted 16 years ago. Zainab hired a private investigator as she suspects that Mazlan is having an affair. A renowned food reviewer is coming to check on The Nom Nom Boys. As they were helping out the wedding prep, Ashraf and Jen seems to hit it off... wrongly.

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 8
programme.desc: Martha tries to convince J.P not to get married to Nadia. Zainab follows Mazlan discreetly and find out the truth. Sally reveals to Bob that she is pregnant.. much to the delight of Bob and the dismay of Sally. Seeing Ashraf and Jen happy with one another makes Nadia have doubts if she has feelings towards Ashraf in the first place. To make matters worse, Martha came to see Ashraf and tell him something that can ruin the wedding.

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 9
programme.desc: Bob is oblivious that J.P is sending him to Bangkok for an urgent client presentation. Zainab met her ex crush back in secondary school, Zack, and got smitten by him. J.P is asking for Ashraf's help as he loses his card. Jen organised a Bachelorette Party and discovers that Nadia might have feelings towards Ashraf. J.P came back home and someone from the past is waiting for him, Sherilyn!

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 10
programme.desc: It's the eve of the wedding and the caterer goes missing! Not just the caterer but J.P goes missing as well and Ashraf feels he knows why. Bob is extremely frustrated that Sally didn't spend time with him to resolve their differences. Mazlan finally opens up about Yanni to Zainab. After almost 17 years, Ashraf did what he failed countless times to do before.

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 11
programme.desc: The year is 2007. Before Nadia, there was this girl in the school by the name of Shayla Anggulia who Ashraf had a big crush on. Bob, an avid basketball player back then, likes to chat on the internet and happens to be in touch with a girl known as Naddy143. When Bob finally wants to meet Naddy143, he asked Ashraf to accompany him. That is when Ashraf met Nadia... AKA Naddy143 for the first time.

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 12
programme.desc: The wedding day. Ashraf and Nadia realised that J.P goes missing (again!) after the incident last night. Something happened to Sally as she and Bob were searching for J.P. Mazlan tried to teach Zainab how to cycle but it's not easy as it seems. An unexpected assistance from someone led Ashraf and Nadia to J.P.

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 13
programme.desc: Nadia, J.P and Ashraf arrived just in time for the solemnisation. After the mishap, Sally is determined to attend the wedding. Nadia and J.P finally weds and Ashraf disappeared just before the wedding is over, much to the dismay of Nadia. After one year of moving away and not contacting, Ashraf comes back and finally meet his friends. And Nadia.

programme.title: Kelab Prefect - EP 1
programme.desc: Adam, Luq and Firaz are notorious in school. However Mr Taufik knows that Adam is a boy with a good heart and decides to nominate him to be a Prefect in order to change him. Firaz and Luq celebrate at the thought of having a prefect in their group. Kael, the snobbish prefect is against this.

programme.title: SQFT - EP 10
programme.desc: An informative and entertaining program that aims to show the uniqueness of the versatile small house and the minimalist life. This unique tv program also shares creativity with the use of small and limited space is unlimited. Viewers will also be taken to a new Tiny house construction project from start to finish over the course of 13 episodes in SQFT's Buiuld Info segment.

programme.title: Hospital Loveline - EP 12
programme.desc: Dr. Arfan confides in his father about Sofia and plans to propose to her. Later, chaos ensues when Razi kidnaps Sofia.

programme.title: JMJ Magika Raya
programme.desc: JMJ Magika Raya follows Ayla on a magical journey exploring heritage and the spirit of Hari Raya. One day, Ayla quarrels with her mum and falls asleep while clutching a folklore book. In a dreamlike world, she meets legendary Malay icons such as Hang Nadim, Radin Mas and Badang. Through these encounters, Ayla learns that the true spirit of Raya lies in forgiveness, gratitude, love and togetherness.

programme.title: Sinar Lebaran 2026
programme.desc: Sinar Lebaran 2026 is a festive homecoming like no other—uniting an orchestral experience with laugh-out-loud Raya skits, as beloved homegrown stars return to honour their roots. Anchored by Hafidz Rahman, Zuhairi Idris, Farhana M Noor, this edition welcomes a pulang kampung line-up featuring the legendary M. Nasir. A tribute to heritage, love and belonging—reminding us that wherever life takes us,HOME is where the ketupat is!

programme.title: Air Tangan - EP 4
programme.desc: Join viral singing sensation Faiz Zikry and his grandaunt, Madam Mira Othman, as they share recipes - her Daging Embek Embek and his version of Pasta Udang Lemak Cili Api. Will they add their own special touch to the dishes?
